text:
A1550B_AUTSM_CD A1550B MR/DD Status: Autism Code CHAR 1 The data in this column identifies if the resident has autism. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not checked (No)
1=Checked (Yes)
^=Blank (skip pattern)
72 A1550C_EPLPSY_CD A1550C_EPLPSY_CD A1550C MR/DD Status: Epilepsy Code CHAR 1 The data in this column identifies if the resident has epilepsy. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not checked (No)
1=Checked (Yes)
^=Blank (skip pattern)
73 A1550D_OTHR_ORGNC_MR_DD_CD
